title: Choose Wisely: WebSocket, SSE, or Polling?
meta_description: Choose SSE for read-only feeds, WebSocket for high-frequency chat, long polling for request/response — real 2026 latency and cost numbers from a 100-user load test on t4g.medium ARM
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams pick WebSocket for everything.

Then they discover their mobile users dropped 40% of frames.

Here is the real latency and cost trade-off 👇

https://kubaik.github.io/choose-wisely-websocket-sse-or-polling

#Blockchain #WebDev #WebSockets #RealTime

Where do you think most teams still get this wrong?
